name: Cashew Yummie Bars
recipeInstructions:
BASE: Preheat oven to 350°F. Mix sugars, eggs, and schnapps until well blended. Beat in flour, baking powder, and salt. Stir in nuts. Grease a 10x15-inch pan. Pour in batter. Bake 20-25 minutes.
TOPPING: Melt butter; add remaining ingredients and mix well. Spread over baked base. Broil 6 inches from heat for 1-2 minutes or until bubbly and brown. Cool completely before cutting.
